description_long: This lantern features a robust, cylindrical body with a wide, reddish-brown upper chamber adorned with dark blue diamond-shaped accents. The top is open, revealing two prominent, dark metallic prongs or spikes that rise vertically from the center. Four vertical supports connect the upper chamber to a smaller, hexagonal base, with intricate, curved brown elements resembling stylized branches or flames encircling the midsection. The lower section is open, allowing a clear view through the lantern, and the overall structure suggests a blend of metal and ceramic materials. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or plazas.
description: A cylindrical lantern with a reddish-brown body, blue diamond accents, and dark metallic prongs on top, supported by ornate brown elements and a hexagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open top with two dark prongs and clear visibility of the blue diamond accents and ornate brown midsection.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view highlights the symmetry of the prongs and the curved brown elements around the midsection.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the open lower section and the alignment of the vertical supports with the upper and lower chambers.
description_view_3: From this view, the prongs and blue diamond accents are still visible, but the brown decorative elements are more pronounced on the right side.
